title: cerastium triviale
intro: Cerastium triviale, also known as small mouse-ear chickweed, is a perennial herb in the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cerastium triviale include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses.
